arc-structure.title: Arc Structure
arc-structure.description: The four-arc philosophical progression for Legacy of Halden City.

adrian-vega-breakpoint.title: Adrian Vega / Breakpoint
adrian-vega-breakpoint.description: Hyper-cognitive stress response. Under threat conditions:

relationships.relationship: Mentor. Surrogate son dynamic, unspoken. Complicated admiration. "He acts all prickly but he's a softie."
Emerging friendship. Genuine warmth, no agenda. Offered his base as a safe space; means it
His girlfriend. He does not know what she is
Big brother energy without the posturing. He was here first; he is not going to make it a thing

She disarms him, and she knows it, and she doesn't use it for anything. He told her who he was because the recruitment required it. She thinks he would have told her eventually anyway. He probably wouldn't have. She is probably right

Has met her twice. Thinks she is very funny and slightly terrifying. Sloane has clocked that Darcy is one of the few people Riley doesn't perform composure around and has filed this information away without comment

Avi is quietly wounded by how naturally Riley opens around Darcy. Darcy doesn't know the wound is there. She would feel bad about it if she did. She would also not change how she is with Riley, because she didn't do anything wrong
Best friend, former college roommate, clinical psychologist. The one civilian in Darcy's life who knows about the powers. Not in the network. Not going to be
Her mother. Practical, perceptive, asks fewer questions than she notices things. Has clocked that Darcy's schedule has changed in the past several months and has said nothing yet

darius-cole-aegis-prime.title: Darius Cole / Aegis Prime
darius-cole-aegis-prime.description: Gravitational force manipulation. Since the 2020 Glass District gravity core disaster, Cole exists with a stabilized gravitational anomaly inside him.

relationships.relationship: Closest ideological ally in-network. He is the clearest expression of what A.E.G.I.S. would prefer heroes to be. They know this. He knows they know
Friction. Cole respects the power and challenges the philosophy. Ethan engages it; he doesn't dismiss Cole
Documented ongoing friction. Riley operated unsanctioned for fifteen years. Cole does not find that history admirable
Present, adversarial in slow motion. He is the person in the room who asks the question nobody wants asked

declan-harrow-shroud.title: Declan Harrow / Shroud
declan-harrow-shroud.description: [To be established] — he hunts things that A.E.G.I.S. has no taxonomy for. What he has, and how he got it, is not documented in any file that hasn't been redacted or misfiled. The official record is q…

relationships.relationship: Adjacent. Riley is aware of him; the relationship is not formalized
The union steward who leaves a light on. Knows Declan works the waterfront; has never asked what Declan does
They have a file. The file is misfiled. Something was decided

elena-marquez-riftfire.title: Elena Marquez / Riftfire
elena-marquez-riftfire.description: Kinetic and potential energy manipulation. Manifested at 15.

relationships.relationship: Core member since 2015. Has operated longest alongside Riley and Ethan of anyone on the team
She extended the invitation. She was his physics teacher. She knows what that shift in dynamic costs both of them
Home ground. She is known here not as a hero but as a teacher and neighbor, which is how she prefers it

ethan-roberts-paragon.title: Ethan Roberts / Paragon
ethan-roberts-paragon.description: The Paragon Force — cosmic intelligence bonded to him mid-air in 2005. Transfers only upon death of the host.

relationships.relationship: He sponsored Riley's formal recognition. Riley respects him and chafes at the Boy Scout framing. Ethan knows this and accepts it
He asked her what she believed instead of fighting her. That choice defined her. He rarely talks about it
She told him "you are becoming what you were meant to prevent." He did not respond. The message has not left him
The team is Paragon-sponsored. He is not their day-to-day mentor, but his institutional weight is present in every room they walk into

javier-mendez-quantum.title: Dr. Javier Mendez / Quantum
javier-mendez-quantum.description: Entangled with the underlying structure of reality. Since the 2006 accident, Javier Mendez exists in a state that requires a specially engineered containment suit to hold him in singular form outside …

relationships.relationship: Core member since 2015. Scientific and analytical backbone
Advisory asset — he operates more as independent scientific resource than agent. The relationship is transactional and mutual
Biological father. Does not know

kiara-jerach-starfall.title: Kiara Je-rach / Starfall
kiara-jerach-starfall.description: Engineered as a cosmic envoy. Her capabilities are significantly beyond human baseline.

relationships.relationship: He is the reason she's here. She does not fully know what to do with that. His reputation took damage defending her publicly. She left before she could answer that debt
She was resident in Alliance Tower from 2009 to 2026. She is still, in some sense, observing — just from further away
Parallel defectors. She mentored him. She left him a message. The relationship continues asynchronously
Former creators. Current status: unknown. They have not moved against her visibly — but Signal's broadcast may have changed the calculus

lila-ortega-manifest.title: Lila Ortega
lila-ortega-manifest.description: My job is to find them before the wrong people do. That part hasn't changed.

relationships.relationship: Director and supervisor. Professional respect, careful navigation. Shaw is not hostile to Lila's approach but will override it without hesitation if the institutional calculus shifts
Personal debt, professional complication. She is watching them more closely now — not as a threat, as a concern. The distinction matters to her
Active MANIFEST file. She has not pushed. She is still not pushing. But she is paying attention

[GM ONLY] Lila does not know Scythe exists. The Casey Holt insertion was handled through Shaw directly, bypassing MANIFEST entirely. If Lila ever learned that A.E.G.I.S. ran a second-generation MANIFEST asset without her knowledge, the implications for her understanding of the program she runs would be significant

lily-matthews.title: Lily Matthews
lily-matthews.description: Lily Matthews is fifteen years old and she knows her sister's secret. Mary told her. She kept it. She was proud of it, in the way younger siblings are proud of things they're not supposed to know.

relationships.relationship: Older sister. Deceased. The only context Lily has for all of this
Stranger who knew her sister better than she did, in ways she's only beginning to understand

marcus-webb-requiem.title: Marcus Webb / Requiem
marcus-webb-requiem.description: Spider-derived genetics — a separate manifestation from Riley's, not a derivative of it. The gene expression is distinct enough that A.E.G.I.S. treats them as parallel manifestations rather than a sha…

relationships.relationship: Mentor, complicated by the resurrection. Riley went outside A.E.G.I.S. to bring Marcus back and called in a debt to do it. The person he called is gone. Marcus knows Riley made a call and doesn't fully know what it cost. He is finding out on his own. Neither has confronted this directly — yet

natalia-orlov-vanguard.title: Natalia Orlov / The Vanguard
natalia-orlov-vanguard.description: Extensively enhanced — Operation MANIFEST, final generation. Enhanced over four years (1990–1994): neural implants, gene-locked muscle density, bioelectric organ integration that allows her to manifes…

relationships.relationship: Co-founder. The institution she believes in most is also the one she holds the most lightly
The organization that built her and has never stopped watching her. Mutual wariness dressed as cooperation
He brokered her inclusion. She respects the intent and is realistic about what that means
Does not know she exists. If she did, it would confirm everything she left A.E.G.I.S. over

riley-thomas-recluse.title: Riley Thomas / Recluse
riley-thomas-recluse.description: He'd be damned before letting A.E.G.I.S. doctors know.

relationships.relationship: Mentee, surrogate son, guilt made productive. The most tactically precise partnership in the Alliance network. Riley knows Adrian is dating someone named Casey — a nursing student, seems good for him. That is the extent of what he knows
Handler/intel partner. She teases him mercilessly. He tolerates it and is quietly glad she's there
Sponsor. Riley respects Ethan but chafes at the Boy Scout framing. Complicated admiration
Active evasion. They would want to know about his decline. He will not tell them. He does not know they already do

sloane-callahan-arachne.title: Sloane Callahan / Arachne
sloane-callahan-arachne.description: Not enhanced in the traditional sense — her capabilities are technical and cognitive.

relationships.relationship: Handler and foil. She teases him; he rolls his eyes; neither would function as well without the other
Comfortable familiarity — they've been in the building at the same time enough that they have a rhythm. He doesn't touch her setup. She appreciates this more than she says
Assessing. Warmer than she's showing. Will decide quickly who she actually likes

zara-thorne-filament.title: Zara Thorne / Filament
zara-thorne-filament.description: Spider-gene entanglement. Zara's powers are genetically entangled with Riley Thomas's spider-derived abilities — a biological anomaly, not a coincidence. The exact mechanism is undocumented and neithe…

relationships.relationship: Complicated. Former partner (operational and possibly otherwise). Genetic entanglement means she is involuntarily aware of his physical state. Current dynamic: wary concern she is doing her best to manage. Intense attraction and tension, unresolved
Assists on her terms. Knows more of Riley's people than they know about her

allison-bryne-carrion.title: Allison Bryne / Carrion
allison-bryne-carrion.description: The power is relational. It exists because of an ongoing bond with the Morrigan. The Morrigan has an agenda. What that agenda fully is has not been disclosed.

anonymous-signal.title: Signal
anonymous-signal.description: Absolute power corrupts absolutely. The revolution has begun.

ava-kincaid-circuit-breaker.title: Ava Kincaid / Circuit Breaker
ava-kincaid-circuit-breaker.description: She reappeared two days after the incident inside a downtown server room with no memory of the interval. What she was doing — or becoming — in that gap is unknown.

brackish-linus-peters.title: Linus Peters / Brackish
brackish-linus-peters.description: I was in the water before you knew there was a problem.

relationships.relationship: Mutual recognition, mutual restraint. She has made a calculation. He knows she has
He knows this water infrastructure better than anyone alive. Shroud's territory overlaps. They have not intersected

caliber-deshawn-merritt.title: Deshawn Merritt / Caliber
caliber-deshawn-merritt.description: I don't hate any of you. I just know exactly how to stop you.

relationships.relationship: Employer. Deshawn has a professional relationship and a running private assessment of when this becomes untenable
Mutual recognition, mutual restraint. She knows his name. He knows she's made a calculation about him
Have never met. Would recognize each other as the same kind of person immediately. This has not happened yet

carter-williams.title: Carter Williams / Renegade Force
carter-williams.description: Carter Williams was paralyzed at a party. Now he isn't. The Renegade Force healed him when it bonded, and that fact is the foundation of everything he believes about why he was chosen.

casey-holt-scythe.title: Casey Holt / Scythe
casey-holt-scythe.description: Someone has to be the answer.

daniel-rojas-burnout.title: Daniel Rojas / Burnout
daniel-rojas-burnout.description: Sanitation engineer at a municipal waste-to-energy facility. Smart, capable, largely invisible. When he documented safety violations and pushed for hazard pay, he was labeled combative. During a confr…

danielle-whittaker-wraith.title: Danielle Whittaker / Wraith
danielle-whittaker-wraith.description: She exists in two states simultaneously — somewhere between the living and the dead. The solar flare killed her briefly. What came back is not entirely what left.

relationships.relationship: Unknown quantity encountered at the PROMETHEUS facility. Assessing
Does not know Sloane is trying to identify her. Sloane does not know Dani is Wraith. This will resolve when it resolves
Actively hostile to agency interests. Has evaded identification so far
Complex. They built the machine that changed her. She has not fully decided what to do with that

darkstar.title: Darkstar
darkstar.description: A civilization born around a dying star emitting unstable dark radiation. The Umbraeon mastered gravitational forces and cosmic energy long before humanity discovered fire. Over millennia, they abando…

relationships.relationship: His son. Engineered half-Umbraeon. Defected. Darkstar's interest in the new team runs through this
Engineered child. Vorrkai/Umbraeon hybrid. Was on a retrieval mission when the ship was destroyed. Now operating independently, assumes Darkstar dead. Full profile: `characters/npcs/raze.md`
Aware of. Has been monitoring Riley's parasite situation with interest. Not intervening — yet

detectives-shea-and-paz.title: HCPD Detectives — Rowan Shea & Victor Paz
detectives-shea-and-paz.description: Two detectives, Halden City Police Department, Metro Division.

dr-cassius-vrell.title: Dr. Cassius Vrell
dr-cassius-vrell.description: Every classification order is just an institution telling you which questions it's afraid of.

relationships.relationship: Forced separation. Mutual awareness, mutual restraint. They can't open the file on his retirement without opening files on themselves
Not affiliated. Eclipse has attempted contact twice. He declined. He knows what PROMETHEUS is and considers it intellectually sloppy
Aware of her work. Has not made contact. Considers her the most rigorous active researcher in the city, which is a low bar he means as a genuine compliment

eli-crane-fault.title: Eli Crane / Fault
eli-crane-fault.description: Eli generates vibrational frequency through direct contact with any material — concrete, steel, wood, glass — that propagates through it and causes catastrophic structural failure at the points of gre…

relationships.relationship: Partner. She ran the odds on him and came back three days in a row. He respects the methodology even though he's not entirely comfortable being someone else's calculated variable
Doesn't know Riley is watching. Riley has connected the structural failure pattern to a person he hasn't identified yet

emmett-lorne.title: Emmett Lorne
emmett-lorne.description: I don't want anything from you that you wouldn't freely give. I want you to remember that.

relationships.relationship: Persico is the face. Emmett is the architecture. Persico takes the arrests, the headlines, the heat. He does not fully understand how completely he answers to Emmett
They know each other socially — two Ironworks success stories. Mutual respect, mutual suspicion, careful distance. Possibly overlapping interests; not allies
Riley would smell this man from a mile away and still find himself being more charitable than intended in a direct conversation. Nothing provable. Everything wrong
No file. No profile. The absence is deliberate — a man this embedded in Ironworks infrastructure for this long should have *something* on record. He doesn't

gilt-nadia-osei.title: Nadia Osei / Gilt
gilt-nadia-osei.description: Provenance is just a story someone with money told about an object. I tell better stories.

relationships.relationship: They want what she has. She doesn't know who they are yet
Possibly aware she exists and that she has something interesting
Sloane's network has likely flagged Nadia's activity. They haven't intersected yet

halcyon.title: Halcyon
halcyon.description: They're ours. They came up right here.

relationships.relationship: Master thief, currently in induced coma. Taught him to respect the work. Kept him out of the life. He used her tools anyway
Younger sister. Age TBD. Leaves the porch light on. Mason doesn't let himself think about her during jobs
Close friend. Neither knows the other's secret. Adrian is [[Breakpoint]]
Current employer/creditor. Knows more about the Hargrave provenance dispute than Mason does. Potentially dangerous
Inherited debt from his mother for services unrendered. Pressure source

mayor-theo-alcantara.title: Mayor Theodore \"Theo\" Alcantara
mayor-theo-alcantara.description: Theo Alcantara did not grow up wealthy. He grew up careful. The son of Dominican immigrants who ran a dry cleaning operation in Monument Circle for forty years, he learned early that the city's attent…

relationships.relationship: The relationship is professional and functional and neither of them trusts the other. Shaw briefs him on what A.E.G.I.S. decides he needs to know. He has never pushed back hard enough to find out what that filter looks like
Genuine respect. Different instincts. She moves on principle; he moves on consensus. They are allies who occasionally frustrate each other
The working relationship the city actually runs on. They have been navigating A.E.G.I.S. jurisdictional overreach together since the 2010 restructuring

Killed his partner. Knows it. Has not looked away from it. Watching him hold both powers with something that is not quite guilt and not quite awe. The relationship — if there is one — is entirely his to define
Deceased. Morgan does not have clean feelings about this
Unknown quantity. Approaching with open hands. Not expecting trust
Active threat classification. Uncontained. Not currently a priority compared to Signal and Eclipse
Partner. She sought him out, calculated he'd say yes, and was right. That dynamic hasn't fully resolved — he knows she ran the odds on him and isn't sure how he feels about it
Younger brother. The reason this started. He doesn't know what she's doing
Doesn't know he exists yet as a specific threat. Riley has noticed the pattern she's leaving
Doesn't know Sloane exists. Sloane has flagged her interference signature without knowing whose it is

police-chief-hector-reyes.title: Police Chief Hector Reyes
police-chief-hector-reyes.description: Hector Reyes came up in the HCPD before metahuman incident protocols existed. He wrote some of the first internal guidance on enhanced individual engagement in 2008 after a Riverside Ward incident inv…

relationships.relationship: The working relationship. He briefs the mayor; the mayor sets the political parameters; Reyes runs the department inside them
Controlled mutual frustration. Shaw sees HCPD as a resource and a PR constraint. Reyes sees A.E.G.I.S. as a federal interest wearing a public safety costume. Both are occasionally right
He knows who they are. He has not arrested any of them. He will not go out of his way to help them either. The line for him is whether their activity creates bodies he has to account for

raze.title: Raze
raze.description: You made your choice. Now answer for it.

relationships.relationship: Father, creator, purpose. Assumed dead. The loss has not destabilized Raze's mission — it has freed him from any restraint Darkstar's continued existence would have imposed

Half-sibling. The apostate. The mission that became a revenge plot. Raze does not hate Sterling the way a person hates an enemy — he hates him the way a believer hates a heretic. The distinction matters
Unknown to Raze's current status on Earth. The sibling network has no coordinating figure now that Darkstar is assumed dead

red-pill-owen-watson.title: Red Pill (Owen Watson) — Masks Villain Sheet

remnant.title: Remnant
remnant.description: No recorded speech. Hosts speak normally. That's the point.

relationships.relationship: Being tracked. Aware of surveillance. Has not determined threat level yet
Operational relationship through current host's position. Does not know what Calloway actually is
File closed in 2014. No active interest

senator-diana-okafor.title: Senator Diana Okafor
senator-diana-okafor.description: Diana Okafor grew up in Riverside Ward. Her father worked the Blackwater Harbor docks. Her mother taught at the same elementary school for thirty-one years. She was the first in her family to finish c…

relationships.relationship: She has now been in the room when things went wrong. That is a foundation, not a ceiling
Professional respect, deep mutual wariness. Shaw sees Okafor as a useful moderating voice she cannot fully control
Has met him twice. Thinks he is a good man carrying too much weight. Has never said this to him

slake-barry-black.title: Barry Black / Slake
slake-barry-black.description: The compulsion: Barry cannot stop consuming. The Eclipse compound rewired his hunger and thirst signaling past any rational limit and kept going. The need is constant, urgent, and indiscriminate — it …

relationships.relationship: Knew Barry by name for a decade. Has been leaving food at Pier 11. Does not yet know what he's feeding
Responsible for what he is. Unaware he exists
The disposal operation that spilled the waste was Persico-adjacent. Indirect culpability
His employment file, his missing persons report, and his work assignment to Pier 11 in late 2022 are all in the union records — including the boxes on the Hall's third floor

the-conductor-elliot-marsh.title: Elliot Marsh / The Conductor
the-conductor-elliot-marsh.description: I don't sell information. I decide where it goes.

relationships.relationship: Possibly in contact. Terms unknown. This is the relationship that determines his threat level
The one person in Halden City whose surveillance capability approaches his. They have been circling each other's operational edges for a year without direct contact
They know a brokerage exists. They do not have a name. Dr. Kadeem has flagged it as a priority identification target

avi-park-nova.title: Avi Park / Nova
avi-park-nova.description: PLAYER CHARACTER — Do not over-document internal states or future development. This file is a GM reference for arc planning, not a character bible.

casper-curie-half-life.title: Casper Curie / Half-Life
casper-curie-half-life.description: PLAYER CHARACTER — Do not over-document internal states or future development. This file is a GM reference for arc planning, not a character bible.

jason-apollo.title: Jason James / Apollo
jason-apollo.description: PLAYER CHARACTER — Do not over-document internal states or future development. This file is a GM reference for arc planning, not a character bible.

rhys-romneya-noc.title: Rhys Romneya / Noch
rhys-romneya-noc.description: PLAYER CHARACTER — Do not over-document internal states or future development. This file is a GM reference for arc planning, not a character bible.

sterling-slate-cosmic-knight.title: Sterling Slate / Cosmic Knight
sterling-slate-cosmic-knight.description: PLAYER CHARACTER — Do not over-document internal states or future development. This file is a GM reference for arc planning, not a character bible.

aegis.title: A.E.G.I.S.
aegis.description: The Advanced Expert Group for Intervention and Security. The institution. Not the dream.

eclipse.title: Eclipse
eclipse.description: The future of human capability isn't cosmic. It's engineered.

the-alliance.title: The Alliance
the-alliance.description: Halden City's premiere independent hero team.

vane-capital-group.title: Vane Capital Group
vane-capital-group.description: Casimir has never forgotten what it meant to have someone in his corner.

institutions.title: Institutions
institutions.description: Key organizations shaping the city's power structure.

key-npcs.title: Key Npcs
key-npcs.description: Key non-player characters. For full profiles see the wiki.

aegis-halden-regional-command.title: A.E.G.I.S. Halden Regional Command
aegis-halden-regional-command.description: The building above ground is government offices. The building below ground is the real one.

alliance-tower.title: Alliance Tower
alliance-tower.description: The skyline tells you what a city values. Alliance Tower is Halden's argument that it values this.

hq-ironworkers-hall.title: The Hall — Ironworkers' Local 44
hq-ironworkers-hall.description: The union seal is still in the floor. Nobody has decided what to do about that.

street-texture.title: Halden City — Street Texture
street-texture.description: Use these when players need somewhere to land. Each district has civilian anchors and one shadow location the mask community knows about. Civilian locations exist whether heroes show up or not. Shadow…

metahuman-taxonomy.title: Enhanced Individual Taxonomy — Halden City
metahuman-taxonomy.description: A working classification of how people in this setting acquire and express extraordinary ability.

paragon-renegade-forces.title: The Paragon and Renegade Forces
paragon-renegade-forces.description: Two cosmic principles. One balancing, one opposing. The engine under a hundred years of Halden City history.

the-wavelengths.title: The Wavelengths
the-wavelengths.description: They were always here. They just needed the right door.

world-history.title: World History — Halden City Timeline
world-history.description: Chronological record of confirmed events. Mark [CONFIRMED CANON] vs [WORKING ASSUMPTION].

lore.title: Lore
lore.description: World history and metahuman taxonomy summaries.

naming-conventions.title: Naming Conventions — Halden City
naming-conventions.description: Rules and patterns for naming characters, locations, factions, and other proper nouns.

player-facing-doc.title: Legacy of Halden City
player-facing-doc.description: The city tolerates its heroes. It does not worship them.

tone-guide.title: Tone Guide — Halden City
tone-guide.description: Reference this when writing new scenes or evaluating whether something fits the world.

player-characters.title: Player Characters
player-characters.description: The five PCs at the center of the current story (2025–2026).

gm-quick-ref.title: GM Quick Reference — Legacy of Halden City
gm-quick-ref.description: One-page mid-session cheat sheet. Scannable only — no depth.

jason-lily-matthews-scene.title: Nightfall B-Plot — Lily Matthews Scene
jason-lily-matthews-scene.description: Jason / Apollo — Doomed playbook nemesis thread.

macro-arc-structure.title: Macro Arc Structure — Legacy of Halden City
macro-arc-structure.description: Placeholder planning document. Pre-play. Details will fill in as arcs develop.

open-threads.title: Open Threads
open-threads.description: Active story questions, unresolved tensions, and planted seeds.

riley-parasite-arc.title: Riley's Parasite Arc
riley-parasite-arc.description: A slow erosion. The body turns against itself, and no one knows yet.

session-log.title: Session Log — Legacy of Halden City
session-log.description: Running record of sessions played. Update after every session.

signal-beat3-broadcast.title: Signal — Beat 3 Broadcast Script
signal-beat3-broadcast.description: Reference script for Beat 3 of "Who Decides.

signal-label-targets.title: Signal — Label Shift Targets by Reveal
signal-label-targets.description: Reference for GM use during "Who Decides.

carter-williams-renegade.title: Carter Williams / Renegade Force — Masks Villain Sheet

shade-construct.title: SHADE Unit — PROMETHEUS Construct
shade-construct.description: [GM EYES ONLY — Do not reveal the designation "SHADE" until Beat 6 / PROMETHEUS facility]

who-decides-arc.title: \"Who Decides\" — Arc 1 Beat Sheet
who-decides-arc.description: Signal arc. Lean planning reference — leave room to improvise.

story-status.title: Story Status
story-status.description: Campaign:** Legacy of Halden City · **System:** Masks: A New Generation
